mapper.select: SELECT id, vehicle_id, user_id, created_at FROM vehicle_favorite WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, vehicle_id, user_id, created_at FROM vehicle_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vehicle_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vehicle_favorite WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vehicle_favorite WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND user_id = #{userId}
